project.name: crust
project.description: TypeScript-first, Bun-native CLI framework with composable modules. Turborepo monorepo of published packages (@crustjs/*) plus the docs site.

commands.all: bun run check && bun run check:types && bun run test

rules: ESM only — every package is `"type": "module"`. No CommonJS.
Use Bun APIs whenever they exist (`bun:test`, `Bun.file`, `Bun.spawn`, etc.) before reaching for Node equivalents.
Indentation: tabs. Strings: double quotes. Biome enforces both.
Tests use `bun:test` (`import { describe, expect, it } from "bun:test"`). Unit tests are co-located as `src/foo.test.ts`. Integration / smoke tests live in package `tests/`.
Do NOT manually edit `CHANGELOG.md` files. Use `bunx changeset` to record user-visible changes to published packages.
Always run `bun run check` and `bun run check:types` before declaring a step complete or task done.
Keep public API surface intentional — changes to exports of `@crustjs/*` packages must be deliberate and reflected in a changeset.
Avoid unrelated refactors inside a task — keep changes minimal and scoped to the file list in PROMPT.md.
